generation_config.prompt_used: Enhance the lighting, make it golden hour, and make the colors pop. Preserve the original composition, subject identity, spatial layout, and important objects. Use these visual anchors: A dark landscape image with visible subject detail. The image appears to be a landscape composition with dark exposure and visible shadows, low light, landscape. Key visible elements: shadows, low light, landscape, sky, terrain, horizon. Create a coherent, high-quality image with natural lighting, clean detail, and no unwanted artifacts.
